# Pull request

## Summary

Briefly describe what this PR changes and **why** (the motivation), not just the what.

Fixes # (issue number, if applicable)

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] New evaluator / framework adapter
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that changes existing behavior)
- [ ] Documentation only

## Checklist

- [ ] `pytest -q` passes locally
- [ ] Added/updated tests for the change (offline + deterministic; no API keys)
- [ ] Code is typed and follows the project style (Pydantic v2, no narration comments)
- [ ] Existing example reward/credit outputs are unchanged (or the change is intentional
      and documented)
- [ ] Updated the README/CONTRIBUTING docs if behavior or the public API changed

## Notes for reviewers

Anything reviewers should pay special attention to (trade-offs, follow-ups, etc.).
